gold.title: Carousel
gold.reason: Full-featured image carousel with microinteractions and custom slider — production-ready media showcase suitable for hero sections and product galleries.

gold.title: Parallax Grid Scroll
gold.reason: Dual-column grid with opposing scroll directions creating a parallax effect — visually striking full-section component ideal for portfolio and agency sites.

gold.title: Immersive Scroll Gallery
gold.reason: Scroll-driven image gallery with dynamic scaling depth animations — premium interactive experience suitable for photography, agency, and product showcase sites.

gold.title: Scroll Cards
gold.reason: Stacking card gallery on scroll with image, title, and description — polished full-section component for feature or case-study storytelling.

gold.title: Image Comparison Slider
gold.reason: Before/after image comparison slider — essential for design, photography, and SaaS before/after demos; highly persuasive marketing component.

gold.title: Progressive blur
gold.reason: Layered gradient blur overlay using motion masks — enables the premium frosted content-reveal effect seen on top-tier SaaS landing pages.

gold.title: Tilt
gold.reason: Mouse-tracking 3D tilt effect with configurable rotation — adds high-end depth to product screenshots, cards, and hero images on modern SaaS sites.

gold.title: 3D Carousel
gold.reason: 3D perspective image carousel — visually impressive, immediately eye-catching for portfolio and product galleries on creative and agency sites.

gold.title: Animated Group
gold.reason: Staggered entrance animation wrapper for child elements — versatile utility that elevates any image grid or card list with professional motion design.

gold.title: Animated Slideshow
gold.reason: Hover-triggered animated slide transitions — polished slideshow with modern interaction design suitable for hero and gallery sections.

gold.title: Focus Cards
gold.reason: Hover-focus card grid that blurs non-hovered cards — visually distinctive team, portfolio, or feature showcase block with strong modern aesthetic.

gold.title: 3D Flip Card
gold.reason: Interactive 3D hover flip card stack — ideal for portfolio, service, and product showcases; polished Framer Motion implementation.

gold.title: Gallery Hover Carousel
gold.reason: Hover-driven carousel gallery — smooth interaction design that works well for product feature galleries and portfolio sections.

gold.title: Image Gallery
gold.reason: Full image gallery component — production-ready grid layout for showcasing work, products, or media on business and portfolio sites.

gold.title: In view
gold.reason: Viewport intersection animation trigger — foundational utility for scroll-reveal effects that bring professional motion design to any page section.

gold.title: Image Tiles
gold.reason: Creative tiled image layout — visually distinctive masonry/tile grid suitable for photography, portfolio, and media-rich landing pages.

gold.title: Feature Spotlight
gold.reason: Feature spotlight with image highlight — effective for product feature callouts on SaaS landing pages with a polished visual presentation.

gold.title: Reveal Wave Image
gold.reason: Wave-based animated image reveal — premium entrance effect that adds a high-end feel to hero and section images on creative sites.

silver.title: Stacked Cards Interaction
silver.reason: Framer Motion stacked card fan interaction — visually engaging but more of an interactive widget than a full section.

silver.title: Image Reveal
silver.reason: Animated image reveal on scroll or trigger — solid entrance effect component useful for hero and feature images.

silver.title: Vertical Image Stack
silver.reason: Vertically stacked image layout — useful scroll storytelling pattern but requires content structuring to be effective.

silver.title: Flip Gallery
silver.reason: Flip-animated gallery transitions — creative interaction but niche aesthetic that suits specific brands over general SaaS.

silver.title: React Tailwind Image Gallery
silver.reason: Clean Tailwind-based image gallery grid — practical and easy to drop in but lacks the animation polish of top-tier options.

silver.title: Cursor
silver.reason: Custom animated cursor with spring physics — adds personality to premium sites but is a global effect that must be used carefully.

silver.title: Flip Reveal
silver.reason: Flip animation reveal for images or content — stylish entrance effect suitable for portfolio and feature section transitions.

silver.title: Image Reveal
silver.reason: CSS clip-path or mask based image reveal — clean animation utility for section entrances, good for about and feature pages.

silver.title: Clip Path Image
silver.reason: Clip path shape masking for images — creative image treatment for hero and feature sections on design-forward sites.

silver.title: Clipped Shape Image
silver.reason: Non-rectangular clipped image shapes — distinctive visual treatment for about and team sections on creative/agency sites.

silver.title: Hover Image Gallery
silver.reason: Gallery that reveals images on hover — engaging interaction for portfolio and case study showcases.

silver.title: Zoomable Image
silver.reason: Next.js Image with zoom via react-medium-image-zoom — useful for product detail and documentation pages but narrower in marketing use.

silver.title: Image Swiper
silver.reason: Touch-friendly swiper gallery — solid mobile-aware image carousel but functionality overlaps with more polished carousel options.

silver.title: Frosted Image Reveal 1
silver.reason: Frosted glass reveal animation on images — premium feel but specific enough in style to limit broad applicability.

silver.title: Circular Reveal Heading
silver.reason: Circular mask reveal on heading with image — distinctive hero treatment for creative and portfolio sites.

silver.title: Image Auto Slider
silver.reason: Auto-playing image slider — functional and broadly applicable but lacks the visual polish of top-tier carousel options.

silver.title: Ripple Distortion
silver.reason: WebGL/canvas ripple distortion effect on images — impressive visual effect for hero sections but heavy and narrowly applicable.

silver.title: Slideshow
silver.reason: Standard image slideshow — reliable and practical but generic; needs custom styling to stand out.

silver.title: Interactive Selector
silver.reason: Interactive image/option selector UI — useful for product variant selection but more of an app component than a marketing block.

silver.title: Image Loading
silver.reason: Skeleton/loading state for images — useful utility for perceived performance but purely functional with no standalone visual value.

silver.title: Image Masking
silver.reason: CSS mask-based image shape treatment — decorative image utility with moderate applicability to hero and about sections.

silver.title: Image Masking 1
silver.reason: Variant image masking pattern — useful for visual variety but largely redundant alongside the base image-masking component.

silver.title: Lazy Image
silver.reason: Lazy loading image with blur placeholder — solid performance utility but essentially replicates Next.js Image built-in behavior.

silver.title: Gallery
silver.reason: General purpose image gallery — practical for media-rich pages but minimal differentiation from other gallery options.

bronze.title: View Magnifier
bronze.reason: Magnifying glass hover effect on images — niche interaction suited only to e-commerce product zoom; not broadly useful for website redesigns.

bronze.title: Polaroid Flick Through
bronze.reason: Polaroid photo stack flick interaction — highly stylized novelty effect; too specific in aesthetic for general client site use.

bronze.title: AI Gen
bronze.reason: AI image generation UI — app-specific component for AI products; not a general website marketing block.

bronze.title: Image Zoom
bronze.reason: Basic image zoom on click/hover — simple utility that duplicates functionality already in fuma-nama__zoomable-image and Next.js Image.

bronze.title: Chatgpt Prompt Input
bronze.reason: ChatGPT-style prompt input with image previews — highly app-specific; only relevant for AI chat product demos.

bronze.title: AI Chat Image Generation
bronze.reason: AI chat UI simulating image generation — niche demo component for AI products; not usable on general marketing sites.

bronze.title: Image Cropper
bronze.reason: Interactive image crop tool — app/settings utility, not a marketing or visual display component.

bronze.title: Image Uploader
bronze.reason: Basic image upload UI — functional utility for app settings pages but not a website marketing block.

bronze.title: Image Uploader
bronze.reason: Duplicate image uploader component — same use case as info-mdshakeeb variant; app utility not suited to marketing sections.

bronze.title: Advanced Image Uploader
bronze.reason: Feature-rich image uploader — useful in app contexts but an uploader is not a visual marketing component.

bronze.title: Image Cropper
bronze.reason: Duplicate image cropper utility — same category as info-mdshakeeb variant; app-specific with no landing page value.

bronze.title: Image Crop
bronze.reason: Image crop utility component — app settings functionality, not a marketing display block.

bronze.title: Tooltip
bronze.reason: Enhanced shadcn/ui tooltip — micro-component enhancement; not an image component at all and too simple for Gold/Silver consideration.

bronze.title: Avatar
bronze.reason: Basic avatar component — extremely common UI primitive already included in shadcn/ui; no unique value.

bronze.title: Aspect Ratio
bronze.reason: Aspect ratio container wrapper — CSS utility primitive with no visual design; already in shadcn/ui core.

bronze.title: Image Cursor Trail
bronze.reason: Cursor-following image trail effect — highly experimental novelty effect; distracting and inappropriate for most professional client sites.

bronze.title: Pixel Art Image Component
bronze.reason: Pixel art rendering of images — very niche novelty effect suited only to retro or gaming-themed sites.

bronze.title: Clipped Image
bronze.reason: Basic CSS clipped image — minimal implementation largely covered by clip-path-image and clipped-shape-image variants in the same folder.

bronze.title: Image Mask
bronze.reason: Basic image mask utility — covered more effectively by the image-masking and clip-path variants; redundant.

bronze.title: Image Player
bronze.reason: Image sequence player — niche component for frame-by-frame image animation; rarely applicable to standard website redesigns.
